channel.title: qwertymarmot.github.io
channel.description: Sharing knowledge is the most fundamental act of friendship. Because it is a way you can give something without loosing something by Richard Stallman

item.title: What determines a machines ability to think
item.description:
Notes:

According to the Turing Test, if a human is convinced that a machine is human through conversation and inquiry, then by all accounts that machine is capable of thought.

Source:

Owl, S. (2022, August 12). Split Brain Psychology [Substack newsletter]. Superb Owl. https://superbowl.substack.com/p/split-brain-psychology
